blockers_encountered.description: FathomDB open/ingest failed: extractor error. ELPS harness returned malformed JSON for ~10 of 100 sessions (unterminated strings / empty responses from claude-haiku LLM). The Rust ingest_with_extractor call raised EngineError::Extractor. Per spec §11: escalate if extractor error recurs after drain increase.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — FathomDB arm skipped; increase drain timeout or retry with a more reliable LLM backend

blockers_encountered.description: mem0ai not available; Mem0 arm skipped.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — install mem0ai + configure a local backend

blockers_encountered.description: no answerer LLM available (R2_ANSWERER_* env unset); retrieval-only metrics reported.

ELPS limit of 100 sessions out of 940 total oracle sessions. Most question gold_doc_ids fall outside the indexed 100 sessions, yielding near-zero naive_rag recall on factoid/knowledge_update/multi_session classes. Temporal recall 0.2857 reflects sessions that happened to fall within the first 100.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Run without --elps-harness flag or with --no-fathomdb to index all 940 sessions; OR remove the ELPS session restriction when FathomDB extractor is stable

note: Option 3 oracle benchmark run (no distractors). FathomDB blocked by extractor error: claude-haiku returned malformed JSON for ~10% of the 100 ELPS-sampled oracle sessions, causing Rust ingest_with_extractor to raise EngineError::Extractor. naive_rag only arm: temporal=0.2857 (38/133 questions had gold sessions in the indexed 100). factoid/knowledge_update/multi_session = 0.0 due to sessions-restricted-to-elps-limit blocker. Pipeline code (T5/T6/T7) validated GREEN; go/no-go numbers require a full FathomDB run with stable extractor. Escalation: extractor error is the primary unblock needed.
